verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the King of my heart Be the mountain where I run The fountain I drink from Oh, He is my Song

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let the King of my heart Be the shadow where I hide The ransom for my life Oh, He is my Song

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: You are good, good, oh You are good, good, oh :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Let the King of my heart Be the wind inside my sails The anchor in the waves Oh, He is my Song

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let the King of my heart The fire inside my veins The echo of my days Oh, He is my Song

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are good, good, oh You are good, good, oh Yes, You are good, good, oh You are good, good, oh

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: /: You’re never gonna let, never gonna let me down You’re never gonna let, never gonna let me down :/

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You are good, good, oh You are good, good, oh You are good, good, oh (When the night is holding on to me) You are good, good, oh (Your are holding on)

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Yes, You are good, good, oh (When the night is holding on to me) You are good, good, oh (Your are holding on) You are good, You’re good, oh You are good, good, oh

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: When the night is holding on to me God is holding on When the night is holding on to me God is holding on
